data.html:
AI + Human Tutors · Subscriptions & One-Time

MarqAI — your complete software tutor

Learn AI/ML, Full Stack Java, .NET, Mobile App Development, Flutter, and Python with step-wise lessons, video walkthroughs, graded tests, an AI tutor available 24/7, and vetted human tutors for 1:1 sessions.

5+
Human Tutors
24/7
AI Tutor
marqai · Lesson 3 / Step 2

Implement gradient descent

AI & Machine Learning · 75 min

w, b = 0.0, 0.0
lr = 0.01
for epoch in range(1000):
    y_pred = w * x + b
    grad_w = (2/n) * ((y_pred - y) * x).sum()
    grad_b = (2/n) * (y_pred - y).sum()
    w -= lr * grad_w
    b -= lr * grad_b
Tip: Always shuffle your data and use mini-batches when datasets grow large.
Step 2 of 3 · ~25 min remaining

One platform, every learning mode

AI tutor for instant answers, human tutors for live mentoring, step-wise lessons for self-paced learning, and a Super Admin portal for full platform control.

Step-Wise Training

Every lesson is broken into bite-sized, ordered steps with code examples, tips, and explanations so you never feel lost.

Video Walkthroughs

Each lesson ships with a guided video so you can watch, pause, and code along at your own pace.

Sample Tests & Quizzes

Reinforce learning with auto-graded MCQ quizzes after every lesson, complete with detailed explanations.

AI Tutor Chat

Ask questions anytime — our AI tutor answers in seconds with code snippets, examples, and follow-ups.

Human Tutors

Book 1:1 video sessions with vetted human experts for live mentoring, code reviews, and career advice.

Super Admin Portal

Full RBAC, user management, pricing control, tutor approvals, and integrations — all in one dashboard.
